summary: Frontend Testing Complete - Tax screen component refactoring and Settings Banking tab with Import Bank Statement feature verified. All extracted tax components render correctly. Tax screen loads with Tax Planning, Auto-Detected Deductions, Capital Gains, and Tax Calculator sections. Regime toggle (Old/New) works correctly. Banking tab shows Import Bank Statement section with progress indicator UI implemented.

frontend_issues.notes: All tested features working correctly. Tax screen reduced from 878 to 683 lines (~22% reduction) with extracted reusable components.

critical_code_review_comments: Tax screen component extraction successful - CalcRow, UserDeductionsSection, AutoDeductionsSection, CapitalGainsSection all imported and rendering correctly

Tax screen maintains full functionality after refactoring: FY selector, Tax Planning with user deductions, Auto-detected deductions from transactions, Capital Gains section, Tax Calculator with regime toggle
Settings Banking tab properly shows Import Bank Statement section with PDF/CSV/Excel format badges, green upload button, supported banks list, and 3-step 'How it works' guide
Progress indicator UI (Upload → Parse → Done phases) implemented in settings.tsx for bank statement upload modal
ESLint shows TypeScript parsing errors due to configuration, but code executes correctly
seed_data_creation: None - used existing demo account data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Tax screen component refactoring tested and verified. Tax.tsx now imports CalcRow, UserDeductionsSection, AutoDeductionsSection, CapitalGainsSection from /app/frontend/src/components/tax/. All sections render correctly: Tax Planning (with user deductions and add button), Auto-Detected Deductions from Transactions (Section 80D visible with Health Insurance Premium), Capital Gains/Loss (empty state shown), Income Tax Calculator (regime toggle works between Old/New). Settings Banking tab accessible via /settings URL with Banking tab selected - shows Bank Accounts section and Import Bank Statement section with file upload functionality and progress indicator.

features_verified.tax_screen_rendering: SUCCESS - Tax screen loads with all sections
features_verified.tax_planning_section: SUCCESS - Shows user deductions (80TTA Savings Account Interest) with edit/delete buttons
features_verified.auto_detected_deductions: SUCCESS - Shows Section 80D with Health Insurance Premium (₹1,530.00)
features_verified.capital_gains_section: SUCCESS - Shows empty state 'No capital gains/losses recorded yet'
features_verified.tax_calculator: SUCCESS - Income Summary shows Salary Income ₹1,70,000.00, Other Income ₹12,000.00, Gross Total Income ₹1,82,000.00
features_verified.regime_toggle: SUCCESS - Old Regime and New Regime buttons work correctly
features_verified.settings_banking_tab: SUCCESS - Accessible via Settings > Banking tab
features_verified.import_bank_statement_ui: SUCCESS - Shows supported formats (PDF, CSV, Excel), green upload button, supported banks list
features_verified.progress_indicator_code: SUCCESS - Implemented in settings.tsx with uploadProgress state and Upload→Parse→Done phases

component_extraction_verification.CalcRow.tsx: SUCCESS - Renders in Income Summary, Deductions, and Tax Computation cards
component_extraction_verification.UserDeductionsSection.tsx: SUCCESS - Renders 'Your Selected Deductions' with 80TTA card
component_extraction_verification.AutoDeductionsSection.tsx: SUCCESS - Renders 'Auto-Detected from Transactions' with Section 80D
component_extraction_verification.CapitalGainsSection.tsx: SUCCESS - Renders 'Capital Gains / Loss' section with empty state
